descGu: X અને Y — robot ને direction આપો!
descEn: X and Y — give the robot directions!

teacherGuide.conceptGu: Coordinates = location address. X = horizontal (right/left), Y = vertical (up/down). (x,y) format. Every pixel on screen has coordinates! Robot move, game character, Google Maps — all use coordinates.
teacherGuide.conceptEn: x,y coordinates — horizontal then vertical. Foundation for all 2D graphics, games, maps.
teacherGuide.storyGu: 'Minecraft block place! F3 key = shows XYZ coordinates. Game character at (5,3) = 5 right, 3 up. Robot navigation = coordinates!'
teacherGuide.scriptGu: 'Draw grid on paper! Bottom-left = (0,0). Right = X increases. Up = Y increases. Mark a treasure at (3,4)!'
teacherGuide.tipsGu: 💡 Battleship game = coordinates! Chess board = coordinates with letters. Minecraft F3 = show real coordinates!

questions.textEn: In coordinate (x,y) — what does x tell us?
At point (3, 5) — what is the X value?
At point (2, 7) — what is the Y value?
The starting point of a grid is called?

questions.textGu: Robot (0,0) પર છે. 4 right, 3 up જાય. New position?
questions.textEn: Robot starts at (0,0). Moves 4 right, 3 up. Where is it?

questions.textGu: Robot (2,3) પર. 5 more right જાય. New X = ?
questions.textEn: Robot is at (2,3). Moves 5 more right. What is the new X?
